raw_data.system_alert: Critical anomaly: lack of scoring without clear explanation.

rag_component.query: What can be done when one of the promotion candidates cannot be ranked by the academy? What are the recovery procedures?

retrieved_sources.document: MENFP Circular N° 087X25 – Advancement au Choix 2024
retrieved_sources.excerpt: Any list presented by academies should contain a written justification of each unranked candidate or the files will be returned by the HR Directorate to the respective academies to clarify or complete.

rag_component.generated_recommendation: Do not discard partially completed dossiers. Extract names of unranked candidates and forward them to the originating academy with an official request for written justification or retroactive scoring.

hitl_intervention.justification: Compliant with Circular N° 087X25, Article 4.4. This procedure ensures procedural equity and prevents unfair exclusion of candidates due to administrative oversight.

learning_outcomes.rule_text: IF score_field IS EMPTY AND justification_field IS NULL THEN block_central_transmission AND trigger_return_to_originating_academy
learning_outcomes.prompt_refinement: Added explicit instruction to cite Article 4.4 of MENFP Circular 087X25 and require formal written justification in the output template.
